title: Million Hours Fund evaluation reports
body: "This first interim evaluation report draws on: survey data from young people attending MHF activities and from staff and volunteers of organisations receiving MHF funding; grant monitoring data reported to The National Lottery Community Fund; and interviews and group discussions with young people, grantholder staff and volunteers, and local and national stakeholders. It uses this evidence to explore what MHF has achieved in the 11 months from the start of Phase Two in December 2023 to October 2024, when data collection for this report concluded. "
